name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Pasadena's Swift Title Loans on Shaver St provides fast title loans with flexible hours for local residents.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is located at 1906 Shaver St in Pasadena, TX, operating as a standalone storefront dedicated to title lending services. The location serves Pasadena residents Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturdays from 10AM to 5PM, and is closed Sundays, making it accessible for most daily schedules.

At this Pasadena location, customers can apply for title loans against their vehicle, receiving funds quickly for emergency expenses. Call +1 346-641-4304 to discuss your loan options and timeline. The staff here can walk you through the application process and explain what's needed from you.

If you need immediate cash in Pasadena and have a clear vehicle title, bring your ID, proof of income, and vehicle documents. Title loans can be processed faster than traditional bank loans, making this location a practical option when time is critical.
pros: Accepts applicants with bad credit scores and past bankruptcies explicitly
Same-day funding available for applications submitted before noon
Borrower keeps and uses the vehicle throughout the loan term
Loan range of $100–$50,000 covers both small emergency needs and larger amounts
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) plus Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Online application secured with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption
Staff member Alfred repeatedly praised for patience and plain-language explanations
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment terms disclosed on the website — must call to find out true cost
Vehicle title is collateral — default or missed payments can result in repossession
Customer reviews follow an unusually uniform structure and language, raising authenticity concerns
Closed Sundays, limiting same-day access if emergency falls on a weekend
No mobile app or online payment management portal (flagged by multiple reviewers as a gap)
best_for: Memphis-area residents who own a vehicle outright and need fast cash
Borrowers with bad credit or past bankruptcies who are ineligible for bank loans
People facing a short-term emergency requiring funds the same day
Applicants comfortable using their car title as collateral for a secured loan
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis vehicle owners who need same-day cash and cannot qualify through traditional lenders due to credit problems. The central caution is that APR and fees are not disclosed publicly, and car title loans carry repossession risk if payments are missed — borrowers must obtain full written terms before committing.
services: Loans for applicants with prior bankruptcies
Collateral-based lending with vehicle title as security
Borrower retains vehicle use during loan term
In-person loan processing at Memphis branch
meta_description: Swift Title Loans at 1906 Shaver St, Pasadena, TX. Quick title loans with fast approval.
seo_title: Swift Title Loans in Pasadena, TX | CreditDoc
